prestazioni: 6.0L W12 (L485) twin-turbocharged engine upgraded with a bespoke **Garrett GTX5533R** turbocharger setup (hybrid billet wheel, 76mm compressor, 67mm turbine) paired with a **Weistec Engineering W12 Stage 4** ECU remap (1,200+ HP target, 1,100 Nm torque) and reinforced **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (9.5:1 compression ratio) with **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** for cylinder pressure retention

Full **Akrapovič Titanium Evolution** exhaust system with 3.5-inch diameter mandrel-bent piping, quad 100mm carbon fiber tips, and **Bentley-specific catalytic converter delete (off-road use only)** with **GESI high-flow sports cats** for emissions compliance in select markets

Custom **Pectel SQ6M** standalone ECU with **Motec C127** dash logger, **Bosch Motorsport 0280158802** high-flow fuel injectors, and **AEM 30-0334** ethanol content sensor for E85 flex-fuel capability, paired with a **Radium Engineering dual-catch can system** to mitigate W12 crankcase pressure under boost
estetica: Full **Mulliner x Vorsteiner** carbon fiber widebody kit (hand-laid pre-preg, 2x2 twill weave) with integrated **Rocket Bunny-style** overfenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear) and **custom 3D-printed ABS splitters** (tested in Bentley’s wind tunnel for 15% more downforce at 180 mph)

**BBS FI-R** forged 22-inch wheels (front: 9.5J ET25, rear: 12J ET30) with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R** semi-slick tires (285/30 front, 325/25 rear) and **HRE Performance Center Lock** adapters for rapid wheel changes, finished in **Bentley ‘Sequin Blue’** with **gold anodized hardware**

**Luxury Carbon Craft** full interior rewrap in **Bridge of Weir ‘Deep Navy’ Nappa leather** with **Alcantara ‘Carbon Black’** headliner, **Mulliner-exclusive** 3D-printed aluminum shift paddles (anodized in ‘Frozen Gold’), and **Bowers & Wilkins Diamond Series** speaker grilles wrapped in **real gold leaf**
